WhatsApp._comment: WhatsApp Cloud API alerts. Leave AccessToken/PhoneNumberId empty to disable. Set real values via the EnvironmentFile (WhatsApp__AccessToken, WhatsApp__PhoneNumberId).

Fcm._comment: Firebase Cloud Messaging push. Disabled until ProjectId + ServiceAccountPath are set (put the Firebase service-account JSON on the server; set Fcm__ProjectId + Fcm__ServiceAccountPath in the env file).
